privileged_info_summary: The task requires completing a 2024 tax return for a synthetic persona, Chloe Tremblay, residing in NB with out-of-province employment (ON). All claims regarding her occupation, the required T2125 COGS structure, inter-provincial tax reconciliation (Form T2203), and business-use-of-home prorations strictly match the task instructions. The relevant tax concepts are governed by CRA Guide T4002 and CRA Form T2203.
